question: Based on this chart showing time allocation on a typical day, which of the following statements is accurate?

options.A: Leisure takes up a larger share of time than Sleep.
options.B: Commute and Work together account for a smaller share of time than Leisure alone.
options.C: Sleep accounts for the largest share of time among all activities.
options.D: Leisure takes up more time than all other activities combined.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Leisure: 34%; Chores: 24%; Commute: 18%; Work: 12%; Sleep: 12%.
